case_title: MEDA HAF SMALL PROPERTIES, LLC VS. EMMA P. SANCHO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDA HAF SMALL PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHO, EMMA P. , INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PHILAM ENTERPRISES DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
